name: Love pearl necklace
description:
This is an interactive jewelry kit where the "reveal" is part of the gift. It typically includes a vacuum-sealed oyster (hidden inside the box), a cage-style pendant, and a chain.
How it Works:
Make a Wish: Before opening the sealed can or oyster, you are supposed to make a wish.
Harvest the Pearl: You carefully open the real oyster shell to find a genuine cultured freshwater pearl inside.
Reveal the Meaning: The color of the pearl you find is a surprise and is said to represent a specific fortune:
White: Health
Cream: Happiness
Peach: Love
Lavender: Wisdom
Gold: Wealth
Wear It: Once you’ve cleaned the pearl, you place it inside the silver-tone flower cage pendant and thread it onto the chain.
Key Features
Pendant Style: Often features a decorative cage (like the flower/heart design in your photo) that opens up to hold the pearl without needing glue.
Jewelry Material: Usually silver-plated alloy or stainless steel.
The Oyster: The oyster is real but preserved in a liquid solution (not edible!).
Extras: Some sets, like the one in your photo, also include matching pearl-style stud earrings and a ring to complete the look.
Safety Tip: When opening the oyster, it’s a good idea to use a small tool (like a butter knife or the plastic tool sometimes provided) and wipe the pearl clean before wearing it to remove any preservation liquid.
